title: astragalus atratus var. mensarus
intro: Astragalus atratus var. mensarus is a type of legume plant belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the milkvetch or ovinia. It is a traditional Chinese medicinal herb used to enhance vitality, boost the immune system, and reduce inflammation. The medicinal properties of Astragalus atratus var. mensarus include its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which can help to alleviate stress, improve cardiovascular health, and promote overall well-being. Astragalus atratus var. mensarus is typically prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and can be used to address a range of health issues, including fatigue, respiratory problems, and digestive issues.
